ISSUE-1 [CRITICAL] src/cli.ts:42 — Unchecked null return from getConfig
  Category: bug
  Confidence: 92
  Reasoning: getConfig() returns undefined when file missing, but caller assumes non-null.
  Suggestion: Add null check with default fallback.

ISSUE-2 [MINOR] src/types.ts:10 — Unused Severity import
  Category: style
  Confidence: 55
  Reasoning: Imported but never referenced in this file.
  Suggestion: Remove unused import.
